title: AX-235
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Structure |image=[[File:AX-235_1.jpg]] |name=AX-235 |constructed= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]] |interest= |rebuilt= |builder= |height= |width= |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] }} {{Quote|Looks like plans for an Imperial Battle Station!"
"Relay it with the next High Security transmissions.|Rebel personnel at AX-235|[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]}} '''AX-235''' was a Rebel listening post hidden in the asteroids of [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]] to monitor [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] transmissions detected by some [[communications satellite]]s, stolen from [[Orron III]]. It was the very outpost that intercepted an Imperial transmission with the [[Death Star plans/Legends|schematics]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. Due to the importance of what had been discovered, [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] was sent to personally courier the schematics out of AX-235, taking them to the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']]. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:AX-235_2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The control room on AX-235.]] The scenario of [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''X-wing'']] is inconsistent with the canonical history (including the [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] opening crawl), according to which the plans were taken during the [[Battle of Toprawa]]. The plans carried to [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] by Biggs in a later mission of the game are not a result of the battle, but are implied to be the same ones tapped by the outpost. The image of the outpost's control room is based on [[Ralph McQuarrie]]'s concept art for the [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] control room for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].{{Facebook|username=RalphMcQuarrieArt|name=Ralph Mcquarrie Concept Art,Sketches|archivedate=20250407050330}} ==Appearances== [[File:IonControl-McQuarrie.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Ion control concept art]] *[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=AX-235 }} [[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic military bases]] [[Category:Asteroids in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Auril sector locations]] [[Category:Listening posts]]
